==================
My RST Document
==================

This is the document preamble. It appears before the first heading
and becomes a level-0 root section.

Introduction
============

RST headings are formed by underlining (and optionally overlining) text
with a punctuation character. The first style encountered becomes level 1,
the second becomes level 2, and so on.

Installation
============

You can install via pip::

    pip install mypackage

Details about the first installation method.
